label: torque (moment of force)
notes: CONFOUNDER CLASS with energy. The SI deliberately names its coherent unit newton-metre, NOT joule (SI Brochure 9th ed. §2.3.4), precisely because dimensional equality does not make torque an energy. v0 does not include a newton-metre unit record to avoid implying joule-equivalence.
